CVE-2019-18849.title: In tnef before 1.4.18, an attacker may be able to write to the vi ...
CVE-2019-18849.summary: In tnef before 1.4.18, an attacker may be able to write to the victim's .ssh/authorized_keys file via an e-mail message with a crafted winmail.dat application/ms-tnef attachment, because of a heap-based buffer over-read involving strdup.
